calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-21-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult, and Change of Name of two Minors.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones #3689.
Petitioner, David Gim Fei Sin, was present in pro per for himself, and as Guardian ad litem for and with the Minors: Polly Ann Sin and Brian Patrick Sin.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: David Gim Fei Sen.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors to: Kristi Laurie Sen and Brian Patrick Sen.

Decrees Changing Names were submitted to and signed by the Court.
